---
name: "Write Tests"
description: "Write Swift unit and integration tests following project conventions"
mode: agent
tools: ["read_file", "grep_search", "file_search", "list_dir"]
---

Before doing anything else, read the file `.claude/skills/write-tests/SKILL.md` in full and follow every instruction in it precisely. That file is the single source of truth for how to write tests in this project.

Then read `.claude/skills/write-tests/templates/test-suite.swift` for the canonical file placement table and suite boilerplate.
